init.summary: Set up server roles, channels, and verification flow.
init.detail: Creates Onboarding, Rules, Documentation, Announcements, Meetings, and role-locked categories. Run once per server. Requires **/scrap** first if already initialized.

scrap.summary: Reset server to bare bones (one text, one voice channel).
scrap.detail: Removes all Granjur-created channels and roles. Use before re-running **/init**.

verify.summary: Verify your email (OTP) and enter holding.
verify.detail: Click **Request verification code**, enter your @granjur.com email, then enter the code sent to your email. Your nickname will be set from your email.

invite.summary: Send a server invite to an @granjur.com email.
invite.detail: Click **Enter email**, then submit the modal. Invite is sent by email and by DM if they are already on the server.

backlog.summary: View incoming users in holding and approve + assign roles.
backlog.detail: Select a user, then use the modal to enter roles (comma-separated) and optional notes. CEO/Server Manager only.

approve.detail: Step 1: Select user. Step 2: Select roles. Step 3: Confirm. Alternative to **/backlog**.

bug.detail: Select repo, enter title/description, optionally tag members. Creates a channel and optionally a GitHub issue.

ticket.detail: View tickets and update status. Senior Dev / CEO / Server Manager.

feature.detail: Enter title and description in the modal, then select repository or project.

schedule.detail: Enter topic and when (e.g. `2025-03-01 14:00` or `in 2 days`), then optionally select invitees.

project-db.summary: View or save project README/schema (project-level docs).
project-db.detail: Select a project to view its schema/README, or **New project** to paste and store. Use **/sql-dump** for versioned SQL dump history.

docs.summary: Browse documentation in bot/docs/ — open folders and view .md files.
docs.detail: Shows a file browser for bot/docs/. Select a folder to open it or a file to view its content (formatted in an embed).

faq.detail: Ask: submit a question (optional repo). Search: query existing FAQs.

repos.detail: Add a repo with URL and optional project name. CEO/Server Manager.

dashboard.detail: Access admin modules. CEO or Server Manager only.

edit-docs.detail: Select a project or repo, then submit new README/content. Stored in database for projects; use GitHub for repos.

clock-in.detail: Records your clock-in time. Use **/clock-out** when done.

clock-out.detail: Records your clock-out time and logs the session.

sql-dump.summary: Versioned SQL dumps per project schema (history, not project-db).
sql-dump.detail: Select a project schema, then view/search dump versions or submit a new dump. Use **/project-db** for project README/schema.

close-feature.summary: Close a feature ticket (only in a feature ticket channel).
close-feature.detail: Use only inside a feature ticket channel. Attach an MD file describing the feature implementation; the ticket is then closed and the doc is saved.

resolve-bug.summary: Resolve a bug ticket (only in a bug ticket channel).
resolve-bug.detail: Use only inside a bug ticket channel. Attach an MD file describing the solution; the ticket is then resolved and the doc is saved.
